title: Kia India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Kia India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Quality Control Engineer with drive and ambition, Kia India in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Kia India:
Kia India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kia India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
